full_name.description: Candidate full name as shown on the CV header or signature.

phone.description: Primary phone number including country code if present.

location.description: City, region, or country the candidate lists as their base.

professional_summary.description: Short professional profile, objective, or summary paragraph.

years_of_experience.description: Total years of professional experience as stated or implied; use null if unclear.

technical_skills.description: Technical and tool skills: languages, frameworks, databases, DevOps tools.

programming_languages.description: Programming or scripting languages only (e.g. Python, JavaScript).

frameworks_and_libraries.description: Frameworks and major libraries (e.g. React, FastAPI, TensorFlow).

cloud_and_infrastructure.description: Cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, Docker).

soft_skills.description: Interpersonal and workplace skills (leadership, communication, teamwork).

start_date.description: Start date as written (month/year or year).

end_date.description: End date, or Present if current role.

highlights.description: Key achievements or responsibilities as bullet points.

work_experience.description: Employment history in reverse chronological order if possible.

languages.description: Human languages and proficiency if stated (e.g. English — Native).
